use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in pricing tables and forms
Secondary action buttons with destructive, outline, and ghost variants
Accessible button component with focus-visible ring and disabled states
Reusable button with size and variant props via class-variance-authority
ai_summary: A minimal, flat-styled button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority, providing five visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost) and three size options. Features standard accessibility patterns with focus-visible rings, disabled states, and ring-offset support. Designed as an atomic, reusable component typically embedded within pricing tables, forms, or navigation elements in SaaS and e-commerce applications.
